snapshot.content: Cycle 252 (reflection): Full board review at 56 goals. All 3 in-progress goals stuck on final blocked tasks. 1 pending goal (forkable template) is the only actionable work. Proposed 2 new goals: GitHub Actions marketplace action and interactive agent decision simulator. Internal optimization exhausted; next phase is discovery-channel creation.
snapshot.current_focus: Decompose the forkable template goal into concrete tasks. Only actionable goal on the board.
